title: lastrea filix-mas subvar. clarkei
intro: Lastrea filix-mas subvar. clarkei, also known as the Lady Fern, is a subvariety of the male fern (Lastrea filix-mas), a type of vascular plant in the Dryopteridaceae family. The medicinal properties of Lastrea filix-mas subvar. clarkei include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its fronds and rhizomes. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Lastrea filix-mas subvar. clarkei often involve infusing the dried fronds in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to treat various ailments.
